intents.text: Verify all changelog attributions are correct by looking up issues/PRs via gh cli.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: double check that all attributions are correct by locating the issues/prs via gh cli

intents.text: Ask where the terrobe PR attribution is.
Ask how many other changelog entries have incorrect attributions.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: how many more cl entries did you fuck up?
then do a new patch release

intents.text: Report that the merged autocomplete feature is broken: selecting with tab/enter adds a space and stops autocompletion.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: i type @packages which completes to "@packages/ " (note the space) and the auto-complete file list disappears

intents.text: Fix autocomplete so tab/enter selection doesn't add a trailing space and continues completing child paths.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: why do we add a space if we select an entry with tab or enter?
